topic: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

options: She had been working for two hours.
I had read this book before you came.
I was eating food when he came.
I ate rice yesterday.
questions.answer: I ate rice yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैंने कल चावल खाया।" = "I ate rice yesterday."

questions.sentence: I was eating _____ when he came.
options: school
reading
when
food
questions.answer: food
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I was eating food when he came."

questions.sentence: I had eaten food before he came yesterday.
options: I had eaten food before he came yesterday.
I had eaten food before he came.
questions.answer: I had eaten food before he came.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I had eaten food before he came."

questions.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा था।

questions.answer: I had been studying for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा था।" = "I had been studying for an hour."
